message:
Running command: # Check for RISC-V GCC toolchain
which riscv64-unknown-elf-gcc 2>/dev/null || echo "Not found"
which riscv32-unknown-elf-gcc 2>/dev/null || echo "Not found"
find /usr /opt /nc /home -name "riscv*-gcc" 2>/dev/null | head -10
ls /nc/apps/bin/ 2>/dev/null | head -20

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Check for RISC-V GCC toolchain

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# Check for RISC-V GCC toolchain
which riscv64-unknown-elf-gcc 2>/dev/null || echo "Not found"
which riscv32-unknown-elf-gcc 2>/dev/null || echo "Not found"
find /usr /opt /nc /home -name "riscv*-gcc" 2>/dev/null | head -10
ls /nc/apps/bin/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
